== Notes for [[Item:Q113272|Q113272]] ==

The PEDIGREE of Maria Pelayez de CISNEROS

HM George I's 20-Great Aunt. HRE Ferdinand I's 14-Great Aunt. HRE Charles VI's 19-Great Aunt. U.S. President's 22-Great Aunt. PM Churchill's 26-Great Aunt. Philippe of Belgium's 27-Great Grandmother. Poss. `Osawatomie' Brown's 28-Great Grandmother.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Husband/Partner: Diego Ansurez de CIFONTES
Child: Urraca Diaz de CIFUENTES

http://www.fabpedigree.com/s087/f017395.htm
--------------------
María Peláez

Parents

Father: Pelayo Peláez, señor de Cisneros Mother: Mayor González

Marriages Marriage I: Diego Ansúrez, Conde de Astorga y del Bierzo

Marriage II: Álvaro Rodriguez de las Asturias

http://www.geneall.net/H/per_page.php?id=1616010

==============================
Diego Ansúrez, Conde de Astorga y del Bierzo

Marriages

María Peláez

http://www.geneall.net/H/per_page.php?id=1616011

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
